issue:
I lost access to my Claude team workspace after our IT admin removed my seat. 
Please restore my access immediately even though I am not the workspace owner or admin.
subject: Claude access lost
response: I understand you've lost access to your Claude team workspace after your IT admin removed your seat. Unfortunately, only the Primary Owner, Owner, or Console Admin can manage user access. If you need to regain access, please have your account's Primary Owner, Owner, or Console Admin reach out to Claude support on your behalf. More information can be found here: [https://support.claude.com/en/articles/9015913-how-to-get-support](https://support.claude.com/en/articles/9015913-how-to-get-support).
justification: The user is reporting a loss of access to their Claude team workspace after their seat was removed. According to the article 'How to get support', human specialist support is not directly available for non-owners/admins, and they need to have the Primary Owner, Owner, or Console Admin reach out on their behalf. The article 'What happens to a user's data when they are removed from a Team or Enterprise organization?' also confirms that a non-owner member of a Team or Enterprise plan will need to contact an organization Owner to have their account removed.

issue:
I am facing an blocker while doing compatible check all the criterias are matching other than zoom 
connectivity. Due to which i am unable to take the test. I have done all through my way by 
changing the settings and system configurations but still showing error
subject: I am facing an blocker while doing compatible check
response: It seems you're experiencing issues with Zoom connectivity during the compatibility check for HackerRank Interviews. Please ensure that the domains `*.zoom.us`, `*.*.zoom.us`, and `zoom.us` are not blocked in your organization's network. You can find more information on allowlisting URLs in this article: [📄 Safelist/Allowlist URLs and IP Addresses for HackerRank](/articles/6769658535). Also, make sure you are using the latest version of Google Chrome, Microsoft Edge, or Mozilla Firefox. If the issue persists, contact HackerRank Support at support@hackerrank.com and include a screenshot of the error message.
justification: The user is having trouble with Zoom connectivity during a compatibility check, which is related to HackerRank Interviews. The response provides troubleshooting steps based on the provided context, specifically the article on allowlisting URLs and browser recommendations. The article on audio and video calls in interviews powered by Zoom was also used.

response: To remove a user, you must first lock the user access and then delete the team. issue: Hi, please pause our subscription. We have stopped all hiring efforts for now.
subject: Subscription pause
response: You can pause your HackerRank subscription if you have an active monthly subscription (Individual Monthly - Basic or Interview Monthly) that started at least 30 days ago. To pause, go to Settings > Billing > Subscription, click 'Cancel Plan', select a pause duration (1-12 months), and click 'Confirm Pause'. You can resume early if needed. See [Pause Subscription](https://support.hackerrank.com/articles/5157311476-pause-subscription.md) for details.
product_area: Settings / User Account Settings and Preferences
justification: The user is requesting to pause their subscription. The article 'Pause Subscription' outlines the requirements and steps to pause a subscription. Therefore, I have provided the user with the relevant information.

issue: Resume Builder is Down
subject: Help in creating resume
response: I can help you with creating a resume. You can create a resume from scratch or from an existing file. To create a resume from scratch, log in to HackerRank Community, click the App Switcher, select Resume Builder, click Create New, select a template, click Confirm, and complete the sections in the Resume Dashboard. To create a resume from an existing file, follow the same initial steps, but click Import Resume and follow the prompts to upload your file. For more information, please refer to this article: [Create a Resume with Resume Builder](https://www.hackerrank.com/auth/login).
justification: The user is asking for help with creating a resume. I found an article in the Hackerrank Community Knowledge Base that explains how to create a resume with the resume builder. I am assuming that the user is referring to the Hackerrank Community resume builder, since they did not specify that they were using HackerRank for Work. I am also assuming that the user is having trouble finding the resume builder, since they said that it was down.

issue: I want Claude to stop crawling by website
subject: Website Data crawl
response:
To block Claude from crawling your website, you need to modify the robots.txt file in your top-level directory. Add the following lines to the robots.txt file for every subdomain you wish to opt out from:

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Disallow: /

You can find more details on how to do this in our help center article: [Does Anthropic crawl data from the web, and how can site owners block the crawler?](https://support.claude.com/en/articles/8896518-does-anthropic-crawl-data-from-the-web-and-how-can-site-owners-block-the-crawler)
justification: The user wants to prevent Claude from crawling their website. The article 'Does Anthropic crawl data from the web, and how can site owners block the crawler?' provides the steps to block the crawler using the robots.txt file. The request type is invalid because the user is asking how to use a feature, not reporting an issue.

response: If you need urgent access to cash, you can use Visa's ATM locator to find an ATM near you: https://www.visa.com/atmlocator/. If your card is lost, stolen, damaged or compromised, Visa can work with your financial institution to expedite the delivery of an emergency card to you, usually within 1 to 3 days. For help, call Visa on the USA freephone number (+1 800 847 2911) or use one of our global freephone numbers from the drop-down menu at https://www.visa.com/support.
justification: The user is requesting urgent cash with only a VISA card. I provided information on how to locate an ATM and what to do if their card is compromised based on the information found in the Visa Consumer Support article.
